meaning: n.[药]氟尿嘧啶,氟二氧嘧啶(一种抗癌药)
examples: The objective is to synthesize 5-fluorouracil derivatives containing 2-5 carbon alkanoic acid.
Click here to read the full 81 page report: Fluorouracil Incident Root Cause Analysis (PDF reader required).
Objective to prepare carboxymethyl chitosan microspheres of fluorouracil (FU-CMCS-MS), and measure the releasing of FU-CMCS-MS in vitro.
This can turn a non-toxic substance called 5-fluorocytosine into a nasty chemical called 5-fluorouracil that kills all cells, normal and malignant.
